title: Google, Microsoft say Chinese hackers are exploiting SharePoint zero-day The tech giants have evidence that Chinese hackers are exploiting the new bug, but warned "multiple actors" are also hacking into affected SharePoint systems.

Microsoft knew of SharePoint server exploit but failed to effectively patch it LONDON (Reuters) -A security patch released by Microsoft last month failed to fully fix a critical flaw in U.S. tech giant's SharePoint server software that had been identified in May, opening the door to a sweeping global cyber espionage operation.  It remains unclear who is behind the ongoing operation, which targeted around 100 organisations over the weekend.  The Chinese Embassy in Washington did not respond to a Reuters request for comment.
